name: Dish Drying Rack Drainboard Clear - Brightroom™: Freestanding Plastic Dish Drainer & Strainer, 18"x15.8"
description: Dish drying racks are great for getting your dishes dry — but not so great at keeping water off your counter. Instead of sacrificing one of your dish towels, catch that excess water with the Dish Drying Rack Drainboard from Brightroom™. This sturdy plastic drainboard fits under a variety of dish drying racks. Simply line the slope up with the edge of your sink to let excess water drain into it. And if the drainboard starts to get a little mildewy, you can easily run it through the dishwasher.
